CustomField.description: Stores the Salesforce field ID of the dynamically generated "Related Contact" Name field on the Relationship object. This org-specific ID enables the Relationship Viewer to pre-populate the Contact name when creating new Relationships. Find this ID by inspecting the page source or URL when creating a new Relationship record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field ID of the Relationship Contact Name field. Enables pre-population in the Relationship Viewer. Find via page source on the New Relationship page.
CustomField.label: Relationship Name Field Id
